subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that ye have steered the firmament of high endeavor upon the pole of the ocean of detachment through divine bounties and heavenly grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله که فلک همت بر قطب بحر انقطاع رانده اید و بفیوضات ربانیه و عنایات
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
